title: ADR 0003 foldable callouts and toggles
aggregateObjective: Implement ADR 0003 foldable Obsidian callouts, toggle lists, and toggle headings with source-backed editable projection and full source-preserving editing/clipboard behavior.

goals.objective: Establish shared live-preview policy primitives and private test fixtures for structural reveal and source-preservation expectations without implementing fold behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Durable fixtures encode structural, title/body, collapsed-subtree, and placeholder regions for ADR 0003 follow-up tests.
Tests lock that structural reveal uses existing activation/reveal policy behavior and does not mutate source text.
No callout/toggle rendering or source mutation behavior for later goals is implemented.

goals.objective: Add editor-wide indentation primitives and visual-only indentation guides shared by callouts, toggles, and existing list behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Indentation metadata is source-backed and reusable by later renderers/commands.
Visual guides do not replace editable source content.
Existing list/task indentation behavior remains compatible.

goals.objective: Create collapsed selection/copy/cut architecture that can preserve canonical source while projecting collapsed visuals.
acceptanceCriteria: Collapsed selection mapping has explicit source ranges.
Copy/cut behavior can target collapsed source subtrees without exposing renderer internals as public API.
Non-collapsed selection and clipboard regressions stay green.
evidence: Added private collapsed source projection helpers in packages/editor/src/live-preview/source-text.ts.
Added inert collapsed callout/toggle fixture tests for title-only selection, hidden body/child crossing, full subtree copy, visual-only placeholder exclusion, and undoable cut/delete policy.
Focused tests passed: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts (3 files, 37 tests).
Touched-file Biome check passed.

goals.objective: Lock list/task regressions and align shared commands before toggle syntax changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing bullet, ordered, and task-list commands retain behavior.
Shared command primitives are ready for toggle commands without public API expansion.
Enter, Shift+Tab, and Backspace regressions are covered where existing list semantics apply.
evidence: List marker projection now preserves ordered delimiters for N. and N) forms and covers complete marker-only lines versus malformed bare markers without mutating source.
Task marker coverage now includes unordered -, *, + markers and ordered N./N) markers with [ ], [x], and [X] source-backed detection/toggling.
Task Enter continuation preserves unordered marker characters and ordered delimiters while incrementing ordered numbers and resetting continued checkboxes to [ ].

Focused tests passed: pnpm test tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts tests/editor-markdown-keymap.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts tests/editor-markdown-list-commands.test.ts (4 files, 73 tests).
Touched-file Biome check and pnpm typecheck passed.

goals.objective: Align inline styling, link, tag, and horizontal-rule regressions with ADR 0003 live-preview policy.
acceptanceCriteria: Inline renderers continue to reveal/edit source at active positions.
Horizontal-rule rendering remains compatible with source-backed selection behavior.
No later callout/toggle projection regresses existing inline behavior.
evidence: Inline style, inline-code, markdown-link, and wiki-link visible content now remains rendered while hidden delimiter/target syntax reveals only when touched by focused caret/selection.
Tags now use a never-reveal policy so complete #m-style tags remain rendered while active/selected, while # alone stays plain.
Horizontal-rule tests now lock inactive rendering plus caret/selection source reveal and incomplete/escaped plain-text cases for --, **, __, \---, and text-prefixed markers.

Focused tests passed: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-inline-registration.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-no-regex-parsers.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts tests/desktop-live-preview-styles.test.ts (7 files, 84 tests).
Touched-file Biome check and pnpm typecheck passed.

goals.objective: Implement plain blockquote and non-collapsed callout rendering/commands while ensuring expanded callouts do not use a whole-block widget replacement.
acceptanceCriteria: Expanded callouts remain CodeMirror-editable source-backed content.
Whole-block callout widget replacement is retired, bypassed, or limited away from expanded states.
Plain blockquote rendering and commands remain correct.
evidence: Expanded callouts now render as source-backed line decorations plus structural marker replacements only; default Markdown block registrations no longer include the callout whole-block widget.
Callout title/body text remains CodeMirror document text, with structural marker reveal scoped to quote/callout marker intersections and no fold/collapse chevrons or hidden body behavior.
Plain blockquotes remain line decorations, while bare '>' lines stay plain and '> ' blank quote lines render.

Focused tests passed: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts tests/editor-markdown-keymap.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-no-regex-parsers.test.ts tests/desktop-live-preview-styles.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-semantic-fixtures.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts (9 files, 110 tests).
Touched-file Biome check and pnpm typecheck passed.

goals.objective: Add callout fold/collapse behavior with source-preserving mutation, structural reveal, and approved motion/accessibility semantics.
acceptanceCriteria: Callout collapse state mutates canonical Markdown source as approved.
Collapsed body editing requires expansion first.
Chevrons are pointer-clickable but not tabbable.
120ms animation and reduced-motion behavior are implemented.
evidence: Extended source-backed callout parsing and line rendering for existing > [!type]+/- Title markers without adding fold markers to normal callouts.
Added pointer-only chevron mutation that changes only the existing canonical fold sign between + and -, with chevrons kept non-tabbable and non-focus-targeted.
Collapsed - callout body lines are visually hidden by source-preserving replacement decorations with never-reveal behavior; expanding first restores direct editing of body source.
Added coverage for fold sign parsing, title/body preservation, structural reveal, title-only and hidden-body-crossing collapsed selections, malformed literal syntax, and 120ms/reduced-motion styles.
Focused tests passed: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/desktop-live-preview-styles.test.ts (3 files, 31 tests).

Clipboard/parser/registry/performance tests passed: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-no-regex-parsers.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-block-registry.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-performance-fixtures.test.ts (4 files, 25 tests).
Touched-file Biome check and pnpm typecheck passed.

goals.objective: Add toggle list and toggle heading syntax plus expanded source-backed rendering.
acceptanceCriteria: Expanded toggle titles and children remain editable source content.
Toggle syntax is parser-owned or uses an approved parser-owned scanner.
Empty toggle placeholder is visual-only and clickable.
evidence: Added private parser-owned toggle range scanning for complete >>+ and >>- title lines with four-space child detection; incomplete >>, >>+, and >>- remain plain.

Expanded toggles render as source-backed line decorations plus structural marker replacements only; titles and children remain CodeMirror document text, with pointer-only non-tabbable chevrons mutating the existing fold sign.
Toggle headings compose with existing heading preview styling, and empty expanded toggles get a visual-only clickable placeholder that inserts a four-space child line without changing copied source.

Added undoable Enter/keymap behavior for shorthand >> / >> # conversion to >>+, title-to-child continuation, child continuation/exit, and Shift+Tab/Backspace child outdent using G002 four-space indentation primitives.

Focused tests passed: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-toggles.test.ts tests/editor-markdown-keymap.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-no-regex-parsers.test.ts tests/desktop-live-preview-styles.test.ts (7 files, 92 tests).
Touched-file Biome check and pnpm typecheck passed. Full pnpm check:biome still reports a pre-existing unrelated formatting issue in tests/desktop-file-tree-styles.test.ts.

goals.objective: Implement toggle collapse, selection/copy, structural reveal, motion, and subtree commands for lists and headings across packages/editor/src/live-preview/markdown-code-context.ts, packages/editor/src/live-preview/renderers.ts, packages/editor/src/live-preview/source-text.ts, packages/editor/src/markdown-list-commands.ts, packages/editor/src/index.ts, and apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/styles.css.
acceptanceCriteria: Collapsed >>- toggles hide children visually without deleting source.
Collapse/expand mutation changes only the canonical + or - fold sign.
Chevrons are pointer-clickable but not tabbable; keyboard toggling occurs only via editor/source/keymap structural positions.
Selection/copy tests cover collapsed children, title-only selections, crossing hidden body/children, visual-only placeholders, and full subtree copy.
Structural reveal tests cover marker/fold sign, title text, child text, syntax-touch selection, title-only collapsed selection, and crossing hidden children.
Collapsed hidden children are edited only after expansion.
Content and chevron transitions animate for 120ms, with reduced-motion snapping instead of animating.
Subtree outdent preserves containment and sibling boundaries.
Existing G008 tests that expect collapsed children to remain visible are replaced by G009 coverage.
evidence: Collapsed >>- toggle child lines are now source-preserving replacement projections, hiding children visually until the toggle is expanded without deleting source text.
Pointer-only non-tabbable chevrons still mutate only the canonical + or - fold sign; expanded titles and children remain CodeMirror source-backed content.
Selection/copy coverage now includes collapsed toggle title-only selections, hidden-child crossings, full subtree source, and visual-only placeholder exclusion alongside existing callout coverage.
Structural reveal coverage now locks fold marker/title/child behavior for collapsed toggles, including syntax-touch and crossing hidden children cases.
Toggle fold content/chevron motion is covered at 120ms with reduced-motion snapping, and subtree outdent now outdents only the selected child subtree while preserving sibling boundaries.

Focused tests passed: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-toggles.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-markdown-keymap.test.ts tests/editor-markdown-list-commands.test.ts tests/desktop-live-preview-styles.test.ts (6 files, 74 tests).
Touched-file Biome check and pnpm typecheck passed.

goals.objective: Run final quality gate and lock regressions for ADR 0003 behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: All targeted ADR 0003 tests pass.
Fast quality gate passes.
No public API expansion or import-boundary regression is introduced.
evidence: Changed one stale widget regression expectation so focused tags remain rendered under the ADR 0003 never-reveal tag policy while code-block widget reveal still behaves correctly.
Touched-file Biome format/check passed for ADR 0003 changed files and the updated widget regression test.

Targeted ADR 0003 regression tests passed: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-toggles.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/editor-markdown-keymap.test.ts tests/editor-markdown-list-commands.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-no-regex-parsers.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-block-registry.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-block-registration-api.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-performance-fixtures.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-semantic-fixtures.test.ts tests/desktop-live-preview-styles.test.ts tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts (15 files, 180 tests).
Full test suite passed after expectation update: pnpm test (63 files, 420 tests).
Import boundaries passed: pnpm lint:boundaries.
Typecheck passed: pnpm typecheck.
User approved fixing the unrelated/pre-existing Biome formatting issue in tests/desktop-file-tree-styles.test.ts; formatting-only Biome cleanup was applied to that file.
Fast quality gate passed after cleanup: pnpm quality:fast (Biome checked 251 files; import boundaries ok; typecheck passed; tests passed: 63 files, 420 tests).
